name: Workflow TDD Plan Skill Chain
description: 7-phase TDD planning workflow with mode routing, conflict detection, and confirmation gate

entries.name: plan
entries.description: Direct: Start TDD planning from session discovery

D_MODE.name: TDD Plan Mode Selection
D_MODE.prompt:
Select TDD planning mode based on user intent:
1. Plan — full TDD planning flow (discovery → context → test coverage → conflict → tasks → validation)
2. Verify — verify an existing TDD plan

Consider: existing session_id, user keywords (verify, validate).

D_CONFLICT.name: Conflict Risk Assessment
D_CONFLICT.prompt:
Assess conflict risk based on session discovery and context gathering results:
- Check for overlapping active sessions with same file scope
- Check for uncommitted changes in target files
- Check for recent sessions (7 days) touching same modules

Conflict risk: high (overlapping active session), low (recent but archived), none (clean).

choices.label: No Conflict
choices.description: Clean scope, skip to TDD task generation

D_CONFIRM.name: TDD Plan Confirmation
D_CONFIRM.prompt:
TDD plan generation complete. Review the generated TDD tasks.

Options:
1. Verify — run TDD plan verification (Red-Green-Refactor completeness)
2. Execute — plan approved, return to parent chain for execution

In auto_yes mode, default to Execute.
